name: Popular High Volume Markets
description: The biggest, most actively traded prediction markets — sorted by 24-hour volume with high liquidity floors to ensure quality. Designed as a 'what's hot right now' feed with aggressive diversity enforcement so each scroll brings a different topic, not 10 variants of the same election question.
customization_hints: Lower liquidity_num to 25000 and volume_24hr to 10000 to include mid-tier markets during quieter periods
Add a terms filter on tags to restrict to specific categories (e.g. ['Sports', 'Crypto'])
Increase diversity lambda to 0.6 if users prefer seeing related markets clustered together
Reduce limits_by_field max to 1 per window for maximum topic variety
Add a numeric filter on volume_num >= 1000000 to only show markets with massive all-time volume
